Uses of Class
com.irurueta.navigation.frames.InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException

  • Packages that use InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.frames
    Contains frames to represent position, velocity and attitude within Earth.

    • Uses of InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException in com.irurueta.navigation.frames

      Methods in com.irurueta.navigation.frames that throw InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void ECEFFrame.setCoordinateTransformation​(CoordinateTransformation c)
      Sets coordinate transformation matrix.

      Sets coordinate transformation matrix.

      Sets coordinate transformation.
